creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sat Apr 26 18:15:06 2014
New Revision: 352345
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/352345
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r352345/

Log:
  - Update to 3.2.14
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - While I'm here, convert to new options helper
  
  Changes:	http://savannah.gnu.org/forum/forum.php?forum_id=7956
  PR:		ports/188956
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Deleted:
  head/www/cgicc/files/
Modified:
  head/www/cgicc/Makefile
  head/www/cgicc/distinfo

Modified: head/www/cgicc/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/cgicc/Makefile	Sat Apr 26 18:15:01 2014	(r352344)
+++ head/www/cgicc/Makefile	Sat Apr 26 18:15:06 2014	(r352345)
@@ -2,11 +2,11 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	cgicc
-PORTVERSION=	3.2.12
+PORTVERSION=	3.2.14
 CATEGORIES=	www devel
 MASTER_SITES=	GNU
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	C++ class library for writing CGI applications
 
 LICENSE=	LGPL3 # (or later)
@@ -23,13 +23,8 @@ CXXFLAGS+=	-Wno-unknown-pragmas
 
 PORTDOCS=	*
 
-.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
-
-.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
-BUILD_DEPENDS+=	doxygen:${PORTSDIR}/devel/doxygen
-.else
-CONFIGURE_ENV+=	ac_cv_prog_DOXYGEN="${ECHO_CMD}"
-.endif
+DOCS_BUILD_DEPENDS=	doxygen:${PORTSDIR}/devel/doxygen
+DOCS_CONFIGURE_ENV_OFF=	ac_cv_prog_DOXYGEN="${ECHO_CMD}"
 
 post-patch:
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e \

Modified: head/www/cgicc/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/www/cgicc/distinfo	Sat Apr 26 18:15:01 2014	(r352344)
+++ head/www/cgicc/distinfo	Sat Apr 26 18:15:06 2014	(r352345)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (cgicc-3.2.12.tar.gz) = 4b3789e94e77b0616d42ac3e6c80b8dab22009dcf997f69df9cd26c5b8bca9f4
-SIZE (cgicc-3.2.12.tar.gz) = 2385390
+SHA256 (cgicc-3.2.14.tar.gz) = 15a0c511c8b384ffd49fd0b7a27e026756d6373a457e0f966c8b3a987c5ce097
+SIZE (cgicc-3.2.14.tar.gz) = 1400200
